name.vi: Chi phi cho moi luot nhap chuot

definition.en: The cost paid for each ad click.
definition.vi: Chi phi tra cho moi luot nhap vao quang cao.

name.vi: Chi phi tren 1.000 luot hien thi

definition.vi: Chi phi cho 1.000 luot hien thi quang cao.

name.vi: Chi phi cho moi hanh dong

definition.en: The cost for a defined conversion action (signup, download, purchase).
definition.vi: Chi phi cho mot hanh dong chuyen doi (dang ky, tai app, mua hang).

name.vi: Chi phi cho moi khach hang tiem nang

definition.en: The cost to acquire a lead (contact info, form submission).
definition.vi: Chi phi de co mot lead (thong tin lien he, form).

name.vi: Chi phi thu hut khach hang

definition.en: Total cost to acquire a new customer, including ads and sales.
definition.vi: Tong chi phi de co mot khach hang moi, gom quang cao va ban hang.

definition.en: The number of unique people who saw an ad or content.
definition.vi: So nguoi doc nhat da nhin thay quang cao hoac noi dung.

definition.en: Total number of times an ad is shown, including repeat views.
definition.vi: Tong so lan quang cao duoc hien thi, co the lap lai tren cung mot nguoi.

definition.en: Engagements (likes, shares, comments, clicks) divided by impressions.
definition.vi: Tong tuong tac (like, share, comment, click) chia cho impression.

definition.en: Percent of visitors who leave after viewing only one page.
definition.vi: Phan tram khach roi di sau khi chi xem mot trang.

definition.en: Average time users spend on the site in a session.
definition.vi: Thoi gian trung binh nguoi dung o lai tren web trong mot phien.

name.vi: Gia tri vong doi khach hang

definition.en: Total profit a customer generates over their lifetime.
definition.vi: Tong loi nhuan mot khach hang tao ra trong toan bo vong doi.

definition.en: Percent of customers who return for repeat purchases or renewals.
definition.vi: Phan tram khach hang quay lai mua hoac gia han.

definition.en: Percent of customers who stop using a product or service.
definition.vi: Phan tram khach hang ngung su dung san pham hoac dich vu.

definition.en: A page focused on one goal: conversion or lead capture.
definition.vi: Trang tap trung mot muc tieu: chuyen doi hoac thu lead.

definition.en: A prompt that tells users what action to take next.
definition.vi: Cau hoac nut yeu cau nguoi dung thuc hien hanh dong tiep theo.

definition.en: A potential customer who has shown interest and shared contact details.
definition.vi: Nguoi quan tam va da de lai thong tin lien he.

definition.en: Comparing two variants to see which performs better.
definition.vi: Thu nghiem hai phien ban de chon phien ban hieu qua hon.

definition.en: The group most likely to buy based on needs and behaviors.
definition.vi: Nhom khach hang co kha nang mua cao nhat dua tren nhu cau va hanh vi.
